---
title: 'What a year! 2009-2010'
date: '2010-12-08T19:17:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4222427297417438597'
blogger_filename: '/2010/12/what-year-2009-2010.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="float: right; margin-left: 1em; text-align: right;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.bvov.tv/emic/ondemand.php" style="clear: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" gu="true" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/goingup-ss-3c2eddfd048c.jpg" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Foundation Message By Pastor George for 2009</td></tr></tbody></table>What a year!<br />God said that in 2009 things that you thought were absolutely never going to come to pass are going to happen so smoothly and so easily, you're going to say, "My, my, my I don't see why I ever was disturbed about that. Why Glory to God!"<br /><br /><table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="float: left; margin-right: 1em; text-align: left;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2010-face-book-statuses-cd3e0f15bbcd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2010-face-book-statuses-85d2bc801ac0.jpg" width="506" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">2010 Face Book Statuses Collage</td></tr></tbody></table>That is exactly what happened. We felt like I would never get out of working two jobs, or be able to move to Texas. I felt like my desire to be a banker coach or team lead were never going to happen either. I gave up trying to be a Personal Banker at the branch years ago.<br /><br />In June of 2009 God gave us a plan and instructions which we had to walk out one step at a time, never knowing what the next step would lead to. We did move to Texas and got to EMIC after three years of hoping to come "Some Day"! I was a Banker Coach by November 1st! Between December and May I had three opportunities to become a lead/supervisor one dissolved quite by surprise. The other two I had to prayerfully turn down. <br /><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020712-f98cf269f816.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020712-81697b8ae8c8.jpg" width="320" /></a>By May of 2010 I was hired as a Personal Banker at the Branch, which was a long term goal of mine.<br /><br />They set forth three stretch goals in training to obtain a raise. By the might of God I hit two of them and got a $1,500 annual raise. I went from making $31,000 in 2009 to $35,500 in 2010. That is not taking into account bonuses I received. <br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020675-5cd14e5fe73c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020675-2f8b906aa9bf.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>By September of 2010 we closed on our first house. A Four bedroom 1,300 sq ft house with a large yard against a greenbelt for $119,000!<br /><br />I started out the year claiming Psalms 65:11<br /><br />You have CROWNED the year with YOUR goodness and your paths DRIP ABUNDANCE!!<br /><br /><div class="NavBar">  <h3 class="PassageTitle"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nas/psalms/65-11.html" id="" title="Go to Psalm 65:11 (Standard View)">Psalm 65:11</a></h3></div><div class="versetext"><span class="versenum">11</span>    You have <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=05849">crowned</a> the <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=08141">year</a> with Your  <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=02899">bounty</a>, And Your <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=04570">paths</a> <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=07491">drip</a> with <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=01880">fatness</a>.</div><br /><br /><h2 id="passage_heading"><span style="font-size: small;"><a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Psalm%2065:11&amp;version=NKJV">Psalm 65:11&nbsp;(New King James Version)</a></span></h2><br />&nbsp;<sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-14872">11</sup> You crown the year with Your goodness,<br />&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;And Your paths drip <i>with</i> abundance.<br /><br /><span><b>The NAS Old Testament Hebrew Lexicon</b></span><br /><table><tbody><tr><td nowrap="nowrap" valign="top"><span>&nbsp;<b>Strong's Number:</b> &nbsp; 1880</span></td><td align="center" nowrap="nowrap" width="120"><span>&nbsp;</span><b>&nbsp;</b></td></tr><tr><td colspan="2" valign="top"><table><tbody><tr><td width="50%"><span><b>Original Word</b></span></td><td width="50%"><span><b>Word Origin</b></span></td></tr><tr><td valign="top" width="50%"><span class="hebrew">!Xd</span></td><td valign="top" width="50%"><span>from (<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/nas/dashen.html">01878</a>)</span></td></tr><tr><td width="50%"><span><b>Transliterated Word</b></span></td><td width="50%"><span><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/nas/deshen.html#Legend">TDNT</a> Entry</b></span></td></tr><tr><td valign="top" width="50%"><span>Deshen</span></td></tr></tbody></table></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><br /><span><b>The NAS Old Testament Hebrew Lexicon</b></span><br /><table><tbody><tr><td nowrap="nowrap" valign="top"><span>&nbsp;<b>Strong's Number:</b> &nbsp; 1878</span></td><td align="center" nowrap="nowrap" width="120"><span>&nbsp;</span><b>&nbsp;</b></td></tr><tr><td colspan="2" valign="top"><table><tbody><tr><td width="50%"><span><b>Original Word</b></span></td><td width="50%"><span><b>Word Origin</b></span></td></tr><tr><td valign="top" width="50%"><span class="hebrew">!Xd</span></td><td valign="top" width="50%"><span>a primitive root</span></td></tr><tr><td width="50%"><span><b>Transliterated Word</b></span></td><td width="50%"><span><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/nas/dashen.html#Legend">TDNT</a> Entry</b></span></td></tr><tr><td valign="top" width="50%"><span>Dashen</span></td><td valign="top" width="50%"><span>TWOT - 457</span></td></tr><tr><td width="50%"><span><b>Phonetic Spelling</b></span></td><td width="50%"><span><b>Parts of Speech</b></span></td></tr><tr><td valign="top" width="50%"><span><i>daw-shane'</i>&nbsp;  <span id="LexiconAudio"></span>  &nbsp;</span></td><td valign="top" width="50%"><span>Verb </span></td></tr></tbody></table></td></tr><tr><td colspan="2"><span>&nbsp;<b>Definition</b></span></td></tr><tr><td colspan="2"><span><ol type="1"><li> to be fat, grow fat, become fat, become prosperous, anoint <ol type="a"><li> (Qal) of prosperity (fig.) </li><li> (Piel) <ol type="1"><li> to make fat, anoint </li></ol></li></ol></li></ol></span></td></tr></tbody></table><br />What an abundant year it has been too. It's only too bad that I wasn't consistent in my claiming that abundance and believing for it's fullness. I wavered often and became discouraged more than once. But not as often as previous years. <br /><br />What is the Lesson? In 2011... BELIEVE GOD MORE! The Word translated Abundance is also the word for Fat or Anointing. Your Paths DRIP with The Anointing... As I walk in your paths more of your anointing gets on me and saturates my life, therefore the more goodness or bounty in my life.<br /><br />This word translated Goodness or Bounty is interesting. It's a complex word. Broken down it means:<br /><br /><span>Tob-adonijah = "my Lord is good" </span><br /><ol><li><span>good, pleasant, agreeable&nbsp;</span></li><li><span>LORD MASTER</span></li><li><span>GOD (Personal Name)</span></li></ol><b><span>I will carry on this declaration into 2011</span></b><br /><b><br /></b><br /><b>Therefore this year, 2011, will be the year the Wolfe Family Bulldogs EXPERIENCE How good God is! </b><br /><br /><br />The Word of The Lord<br />Our 2009 Marching Orders<br />Saturday, November 15, 2008<br />Washington DC Victory Campaign<br />by Kenneth Copeland<br /><br />Well, what about 2009?<br />Shall it be a time of darkness?<br />Or, shall this be a place where the Glory shines?<br />Yes, the Glory is here.<br />The glory has come and things in 2009 that you thought were absolutely never ever going to come to pass are going to happen so smoothly and so easily, youâ€™re going to say, â€œMy, my, my. I donâ€™t see why I ever was disturbed about that. Why, Glory to God!â€<br />And itâ€™s going to increase and increase and increase. And before the end of 2009 you wonâ€™t be able to recognize yourself or your nation, because the Spirit of the Living God will be moving in ways that youâ€™ve only dreamed about up till now and youâ€™ll be on your way to more wonderful and greater things.<br /><br />Declaration of Faith<br />The Perfect Will of God for 2010<br /><br />I will not make a move unless I know that it is Your will. I wonâ€™t settle for anything less than Your<br />very best. There are many plans in a manâ€™s mind, but it is the Lordâ€™s purpose for him that will<br />stand. (Proverbs 19:21 AMP)<br />I seek not my own will in 2010â€”but I seek the will of my Father who has sent me here.<br />(John 5:30 KJV)<br />I declare by faith and believe it with all my heart. The perfect will of the Lord will come to pass in<br />my life in 2010. Thank you, Father, for Your perfect will.<br /><br />Word From the Lord<br />Given to Kenneth Copeland<br />August 6, 2010<br />Everything Is Going to Be ALL-RIGHT in the Household of Faith<br />The world is in serious trouble. But for the household of faith and those that<br />will cling to My Word and listen very carefully, and do this thing that I have<br />demonstrated before you tonight, and night after night after night. You can do<br />that. You can do it yourself. You can stand in your place and you can worship, and<br />you can praise in the face of hell itself. And you can praise yourself into that place<br />where you say, â€œHa, ha, ha. Everything is going to be all right.â€<br />The world, Iâ€™ll tell you again, is in serious trouble. Some very hard things are<br />coming, in different places around the world. Very difficult times in a lot of<br />places. Theyâ€™re that way now, but theyâ€™ll not get better. They will continue to get<br />worse and worse and worse. It is on a downhill run that the world cannot stop.<br />But, for the household of faith, everythingâ€™s going to be all right. Everything is<br />going to be all right.<br />Oh, yeahâ€”youâ€™ll have to make a stand. Youâ€™ll have to fight the good fight of<br />faith. But, when did you not have to do that? These are dangerous times. Theyâ€™re<br />dangerous times financially. Theyâ€™re dangerous times in the earth because the<br />earth is weighted under a gross weight of sin. There are things and places and<br />situations underneath the earth, in the oceans, in the heavens. Things are being<br />rattled and shaken. The earth is trying to break in different places.<br />Stand on My Word and itâ€™ll not come nigh you. Praise and worship My Name.<br />Donâ€™t feed and feed fear and feed trouble into your life and into your mouth. No,<br />no, no, no. Quit living in that house. Get on back over here in the household of<br />faith. Feed on My Word, not on the bread of sorrow. Feed on My Word. Look<br />in My face. Praise and worship. And praise and worship. In church, praise and<br />worship and preach the Word. Praise and worship and preach the Word. Praise and<br />worship and preach the Word. Everythingâ€™s going to be all right.<br />For as I have said, and will continue to say until it becomes solid and strong in<br />your spiritâ€”your time has come. It is your time to excel. It is your time to do<br />exceeding, extraordinary things in the financial world, in the medical world, in all<br />of the areas where the world is in such dire trouble and so confused that theyâ€™re<br />confused beyond their ability to understand how confused they really are. And<br />theyâ€™re hurting because of it. They are crying out because of it. People are trying to take advantage of people because theyâ€™re so confused and because theyâ€™re so<br />troubled.<br />And Iâ€™ll tell you right now there are politicians and there are so-called business<br />people and there are thieves and there are all kinds of demonic folks who are<br />trying to take advantage of My people during a confusing time, and I will tell you<br />right now, saith the Lord, you can write it down and you can know it for sure, I<br />wonâ€™t put up with it and Iâ€™ll stop them from doing such a thing. And you are going<br />to see some things happen.<br />Fear not. I have My eye on them. They will go so far and no further. Their end is<br />already determined. Iâ€™ll not put up with it, saith the Lord of grace. I will not put<br />up with it. They have pushed me and pushed me and invited me out of their lives<br />and their thinking and in many cases and many personalities and many people<br />that are at the forefront of the news in this hour, I have already turned over to a<br />disobedient, reprobate mind.<br />I am the Lord and I will not have My people run roughshod, My people that are<br />crying out to Me. I utter My word through my servant tonight and you make mark<br />of it. But, everything is going to be all right in your house. Hallelujah. Amen.<br />I never have, until I heard that coming up in my spirit and then I saw it in the spirit, I saw<br />the word all right, everything is going to be (spelled) â€œall-right.â€ All-right.<br />Glory to God. Anything else, Lord, that You want to deliver? Praise God, Yes, Sir.<br />Now before you are seated, I want you to say to someone, â€œI believe that. Everything is<br />going to be all-right.â€ Take hold of it. Take hold of it. Everything is going to be ALL- RIGHT.<br />ALL-RIGHT.
